title: How to Align Primary and Secondary Sales Visibility
description: Unify distributor billing and field execution signals to reduce blind spots and improve replenishment decisions.
excerpt: Many teams can report primary and secondary sales, but few can connect them in time to act. Here is a simple alignment model.
author: Ezupp Product Team

sections.text: Primary sales explain upstream movement, secondary sales explain market pull. Reliable planning requires both in one operating view.

items: Single SKU code and outlet taxonomy across systems.
Daily sync checkpoints for order, stock, and invoicing events.

sections.text: Surface gaps such as high primary dispatch with weak secondary offtake, then trigger rep-level action plans automatically.
